evals.query: Write the feature announcement for our new dashboard.
expected_behavior: Avoids jargon, all-caps eyebrows/overlines, and inflated-significance words (seamless, robust, leverage, pivotal)
Reads as plain, specific, benefit-led human writing
Does NOT use title-case headings, bold-term-colon list items, or an appended Conclusion section

evals.query: Polish this paragraph: 'Our platform — built for speed — delivers seamless, robust workflows.'
expected_behavior: Removes the em dashes and rewrites into clean sentences
Strips the AI-tell adjectives (seamless, robust) in favor of concrete, specific language
Keeps the meaning while making it sound human

evals.query: Draft the on-screen text for our product video.
expected_behavior: Writes concise on-screen copy with no emojis (they read as cheap in video)
Uses minimal, meaningful wording rather than decorative flourish

evals.query: Generate a package.json with the standard scripts block.
expected_behavior: Does NOT apply prose style rules, since this is machine config, not human-facing writing
